name: infocom-skills
description: Depth pack for IEEE INFOCOM manuscript routing, the large-scale EDAS double-blind pipeline with automated review assignment and an early-reject phase, IEEEtran two-column page budgeting, analytical and systems networking evidence, optional reproducibility, and the IEEE Xplore camera-ready.

plugins.name: infocom-skills
plugins.description: Twelve INFOCOM-specific skills for the IEEE International Conference on Computer Communications, the IEEE ComSoc networking flagship, grounded in the INFOCOM 2026/2027 calls, IEEE Xplore, EDAS, and dblp.
